mapper.select: SELECT FROM `module_state_record` WHERE `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `seq` DESC, `state_record_id` DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM `module_state_record` WHERE `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `seq`, `state_record_id`
mapper.update: UPDATE `module_state_record` SET `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `seq` = #{seq, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `round_no` = #{roundNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `event_type` = #{eventType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `from_state` = #{fromState, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `to_state` = #{toState, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `from_node_id` = #{fromNodeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `to_node_id` = #{toNodeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `result` = #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `summary` = #{summary, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE `state_record_id` = #{stateRecordId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
